items.title_en: Battles brew over in-state tuition for undocumented students
items.title_zh: 为无证学生酝酿的州内学费之争
items.desc_en: In some states, undocumented students have access to in-state college tuition if they meet certain requirements. Now, many of those laws are being challenged.
items.desc_zh: 在一些州，如果符合某些要求，无证学生可以获得州内大学学费。现在，这些法律中的许多法律都受到了挑战。

items.title_en: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
items.title_zh: 债券市场对私人信贷危机的担忧如何在固定收益ETF中发挥作用
items.desc_en: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.
items.desc_zh: 在私人信贷危机的恐慌到来之际，不断增长且透明度较低的债券市场正被纳入更多的固定收益ETF。

items.title_en: Intel leads the list of most overbought stocks after this week's comeback rally
items.title_zh: 英特尔在本周复苏反弹后领跑最超买股票榜单
items.desc_en: Intel posted a double-digit gain on the week as it appeared to start shedding its reputation as an old guard stalwart.
items.desc_zh: 英特尔本周实现了两位数的增长，因为它似乎开始摆脱其作为老卫士的坚定声誉。

items.title_en: How Kodak is trying to turn around its business after teetering on bankruptcy
items.title_zh: 柯达在破产摇摇欲坠后如何努力扭转业务
items.desc_en: Photography company Eastman Kodak has seen its fair share of financial struggles, but CEO Jim Continenza is determined to fuel its success.
items.desc_zh: 摄影公司伊士曼柯达（ Eastman Kodak ）经历了相当多的财务困境，但首席执行官吉姆·康廷扎（ Jim Continenza ）决心推动其成功。

items.title_en: Vibe check from inside one of AI industry's main events: 'Claude mania'
items.title_zh: 来自人工智能行业主要活动之一的氛围检查： “克劳德狂热”
items.desc_en: At the HumanX conference in San Francisco this week, Anthropic's momentum was on everyone's lips.
items.desc_zh: 在本周于旧金山举行的HumanX大会上， Anthropic的势头触动了所有人。

items.title_en: A little known semiconductor packaging and testing stock is poised to gain in AI boom. Why analysts like it
items.title_zh: 一些鲜为人知的半导体封装和测试库存有望在人工智能热潮中获得增长。为什么分析师喜欢它
items.desc_en: Amkor Technologies is a derivative play on artificial intelligence amid the data center boom, analysts say.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示， Amkor Technologies是数据中心繁荣时期人工智能的衍生品。

items.title_en: Berkshire electric utility's court win could save it billions
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔电力公司的胜诉可以为其节省数十亿美元
items.desc_en: PacifiCorp court win could reduce wildfire damages by $1 billion or more.
items.desc_zh: PacifiCorp法庭获胜可以减少10亿或更多$的野火损失。

items.title_en: OpenAI identifies security issue involving third-party tool, says user data was not accessed
items.title_zh: OpenAI识别涉及第三方工具的安全问题，称用户数据未被访问
items.desc_en: The ChatGPT maker said it found no evidence that its user data was accessed or that its systems or intellectual property were compromised.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT制造商表示，没有发现任何证据表明其用户数据被访问或其系统或知识产权受到损害。

items.title_en: U.S.-Iran talks set to begin in Pakistani capital after delegations arrive
items.title_zh: 美伊会谈将在代表团抵达后在巴基斯坦首都开始
items.desc_en: Pakistan confirmed the arrival of Iran's parliament speaker and foreign minister ahead of talks with a U.S. delegation led by Vice President JD Vance.
items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦证实，伊朗议会议长和外交部长在与副总统万斯率领的美国代表团会谈之前抵达。

items.title_en: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
items.title_zh: 特朗普政策，中国的生物技术热潮正在结束欧洲的制药巨头时代
items.desc_en: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，公司一直对欧洲分散的资本市场、定价和临床试验采用单一市场以及报销政策不均表示遗憾。

items.title_en: Elon Musk’s xAI faces fresh opposition after landing permit for Mississippi power plant
items.title_zh: 伊隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）的XAI在密西西比发电厂的登陆许可后面临新的反对
items.desc_en: Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX, faces a legal challenge from environmental groups opposed to a massive power plant in Mississippi.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的xAI现在由SpaceX拥有，面临来自反对密西西比州一家大型发电厂的环保组织的法律挑战。

items.title_en: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
items.title_zh: 新的效果图显示，特朗普250英尺的“凯旋门”将笼罩波托马克
items.desc_en: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."
items.desc_zh: 众议员唐·贝耶（ Don Beyer ）说： “特朗普总统专注于一个由纳税人资助的虚荣项目，该项目将堵塞交通，阻挡我们的天际线，并在神圣的土地上建造塔楼。”

items.title_en: Vance, Bessent questioned tech giants on AI security before Anthropic's Mythos release
items.title_zh: 在Anthropic的Mythos发布之前， Vance, Bessent向科技巨头询问了人工智能安全问题
items.desc_en: Bessent and Fed Chair Jerome Powell separately met with the heads of the biggest U.S. banks to address the potential cyber threat of Anthropic's Mythos.
items.desc_zh: 贝森特和美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔分别会见了美国最大银行的负责人，以应对人类神话的潜在网络威胁。

items.title_en: Sam Altman's house hit with Molotov cocktail, OpenAI San Francisco headquarters threatened
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼（ Sam Altman ）的房子被莫洛托夫鸡尾酒击中， OpenAI旧金山总部受到威胁
items.desc_en: Police arrested a suspect at OpenAI's headquarters for allegedly threatening arson after an attack on CEO Sam Altman's home.
items.desc_zh: 警方在OpenAI总部逮捕了一名嫌疑人，涉嫌在袭击首席执行官Sam Altman的家后威胁纵火。

items.title_en: Apple unveils its most affordable laptop ever. What the MacBook Neo means for investors
items.title_zh: 苹果推出了有史以来最实惠的笔记本电脑。MacBook NEO对投资者意味着什么
items.desc_en: The company is casting a new line to reel users into its ecosystem, with fresh hardware as the lure and services as the hook.
items.desc_zh: 该公司正在铸造一条新线路，将用户卷入其生态系统，以新鲜的硬件为诱饵，以服务为钩子。

items.title_en: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
items.title_zh: Michael Burry表示，在特朗普提振股价后，他仍在押注Palantir
items.desc_en: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.
items.desc_zh: “大空头”名声的投资者表示，他继续持有这家人工智能软件公司的长期看跌期权。

items.title_en: Trump praises Palantir with stock down 14% this week as Iran conflict drags on
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗冲突的拖延，特朗普称赞Palantir本周股价下跌14 ％
items.desc_en: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 据报道， Palantir的Maven平台已被用于美国在伊朗的军事行动。

items.title_en: Artemis II astronauts hurtle home from moon toward splashdown
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号宇航员从月球飞向飞溅
items.desc_en: NASA’s four Artemis II astronauts return to Earth after a historic moon mission, with Orion set for Pacific splashdown shortly after 8 p.m. ET.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局的四名阿尔忒弥斯II号宇航员在完成历史性的月球任务后返回地球，猎户座将在美国东部时间晚上8点后不久进行太平洋溅落。

items.title_en: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 由于特朗普要求重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，美国石油价格跌破100 $
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普（ Donald Trump ）周四警告伊朗，如果它正在为通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮充电，就要“立即停止”。

items.title_en: How scared of AI should we be? A new documentary film from an Oscar winner seeks answer
items.title_zh: 我们应该对人工智能有多害怕？奥斯卡获奖者的新纪录片寻求答案
items.desc_en: Producers of AI documentary share behind-the-scenes moments from film that includes Sam Altman, Anthropic's Dario Amodei and Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能纪录片的制片人分享了电影的幕后时刻，包括Sam Altman、Anthropic的Dario Amodei和Google DeepMind的Demis Hassabis。

items.title_en: Consumer sentiment hits record low, inflation fears rise amid Iran war
items.title_zh: 消费者信心创历史新低，伊朗战争期间通胀担忧加剧

items.title_en: CoreWeave adds ninth top AI model provider with deal to power Anthropic's Claude
items.title_zh: CoreWeave增加了第九大顶级人工智能模型提供商，为Anthropic的Claude提供动力
items.desc_en: The deal comes one day after Meta committed an additional $21 billion in spending to the cloud provider as AI demand continues to soar.
items.desc_zh: 随着人工智能需求的持续飙升， Meta承诺向云提供商额外投入210亿美元$。

items.title_en: Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗冲突导致能源价格飙升， 3月份消费者价格上涨3.3%
items.desc_en: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识， 3月份消费者价格指数预计同比增长3.3%。

items.title_en: Powell, Bessent discussed Anthropic's Mythos AI cyber threat with major U.S. banks
items.title_zh: Powell, Bessent与美国主要银行讨论了Anthropic的Mythos AI网络威胁
items.desc_en: Anthropic rolled out the new Mythos AI model to a select group of companies over concerns that hackers could exploit its capabilities.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic向一组选定的公司推出了新的Mythos AI模型，担心黑客可能会利用其功能。

items.title_en: Standstill in the Strait of Hormuz, new inflation data, Warsh's Senate hearing and more in Morning Squawk
items.title_zh: 停留在霍尔木兹海峡，新的通货膨胀数据， Warsh的参议院听证会以及Morning Squawk的更多内容
items.desc_en: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
items.desc_zh: 以下是投资者在开始交易日时需要了解的五个关键事项。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Lumentum, ServiceNow, Sandisk & more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大： Lumentum、ServiceNow、Sandisk等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
items.title_zh: 贝莱德从对冲基金剧本中撕下页面，将其应用于交易所交易基金
items.desc_en: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.
items.desc_zh: 贝莱德的Jeffrey Rosenberg在该公司的流动性另类ETF中发挥着主导作用，该ETF在ETF包装中使用长空策略。

items.title_en: The Tech Download: Reputational damage, supply chain issues and local investment. What's next for Middle East tech?
items.title_zh: 技术下载：声誉损害、供应链问题和本地投资。中东科技的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: A two-week ceasefire was agreed between the U.S. and Iran on Wednesday, prompting hopes of the beginnings of the end of the conflict.
items.desc_zh: 周三，美国和伊朗达成了为期两周的停火协议，引发了冲突开始结束的希望。

items.title_en: Alibaba just revealed it’s behind a viral AI video model dominating leaderboards
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴刚刚透露，它背后是一个病毒式的人工智能视频模型，主导着排行榜
items.desc_en: A mysterious AI video model that has ascended global leaderboards has been confirmed as a project under Alibaba.
items.desc_zh: 一个神秘的人工智能视频模型已经登上全球排行榜，已被确认为阿里巴巴旗下的一个项目。

items.title_en: TSMC posts 35% jump in revenue to new record high as AI chip demand stays strong
items.title_zh: 由于人工智能芯片需求保持强劲，台积电收入增长35% ，创历史新高
items.desc_en: TSMC is benefiting from sustained demand for advanced semiconductors from its key customers like Apple and Nvidia.
items.desc_zh: 台积电受益于苹果和英伟达等主要客户对先进半导体的持续需求。

items.title_en: Behind China's 'active efforts' for an Iran ceasefire: Business trumps politics
items.title_zh: 中国“积极努力”实现伊朗停火的背后：商业胜过政治
items.desc_en: The big risk for Beijing is that the Iran war drags down global demand for the exports that are driving China's economic growth.
items.desc_zh: 北京面临的最大风险是，伊朗战争拖累了全球对推动中国经济增长的出口需求。

items.title_en: The Trump administration is getting angry as EU Big Tech fines top $7 billion in 2 years
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府正在生气，因为欧盟大型科技公司在2年内罚款超过70 $
items.desc_en: The European Commission and Trump administration are increasingly clashing over the bloc's actions against U.S. tech companies.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟委员会和特朗普政府在欧盟对美国科技公司的行动上越来越多地发生冲突。

items.title_en: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
items.title_zh: 随着LLM限制的出现，阿里巴巴牵头投资$ 2.9亿用于构建一种新型AI模型
items.desc_en: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.
items.desc_zh: 创业公司Shengshu计划将这笔资金用于“通用世界模型” ，为更实用的机器人应用铺平道路。

items.title_en: AI threat's relentless flogging of software stocks shows no end in sight with Anthropic's new agent
items.title_zh: 人工智能威胁对软件库存的无情鞭笞表明， Anthropic的新代理人看不到尽头
items.desc_en: The latest revenue projections and updates from Anthropic revived investor fears of an AI day of reckoning coming for software.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic的最新收入预测和更新重新引发了投资者对人工智能软件清算日的担忧。

items.title_en: Inflation held sticky at 3% as U.S. headed into war with Iran, key Fed gauge shows
items.title_zh: 美联储关键指标显示，随着美国与伊朗开战，通货膨胀率保持在3%
items.desc_en: The gauge released Thursday offers the Federal Reserve a snapshot of conditions leading into the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 周四发布的指标为美联储提供了导致伊朗战争的条件的快照。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Constellation Brands, Datadog, Occidental Petroleum, CoreWeave and more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票： Constellation Brands、Datadog、Occidental Petroleum、CoreWeave等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前市场上涨幅度最大的股票。

items.title_en: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
items.title_zh: 伊朗石油危机唤起人们对1997年亚洲金融危机的回忆—但这就是历史可能不会重演的原因
items.desc_en: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹危机正在打击亚洲经济，能源成本飙升，货币贬值，但三十年前的危机不太可能重演。

items.title_en: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年将降息
items.desc_en: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.desc_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通货膨胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title_en: Markets shift back towards potential Fed rate cut this year with Iran ceasefire in place
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗停火，市场转向今年可能的美联储降息
items.desc_en: Odds for a reduction jumped Wednesday morning, hitting about 43%, according to the CME Group.
items.desc_zh: 芝加哥商品交易所集团(CME Group)的数据显示，周三上午降价的几率大幅上升，达到约43%。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta Air Lines, Levi Strauss, Exxon Mobil & more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票：达美航空、李维斯、埃克森美孚等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire sparks market relief — but no clear path to lasting peace
items.title_zh: 脆弱的美伊停火引发市场缓解—但没有通往持久和平的明确道路
items.desc_en: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.
items.desc_zh: 分析师告诉CNBC ，脆弱的停火协议可能面临重大挑战，理由是双方都存在严重的信任赤字。

items.title_en: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.title_zh: Ray Dalio ：特朗普-习近平会晤将聚焦贸易、资本流动
items.desc_en: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting  between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.desc_zh: Bridgewater创始人Ray Dalio告诉CNBC ，他对下个月美国和中国总统会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Broadcom, UnitedHealth, Casey's General Stores and more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大： Broadcom、UnitedHealth、Casey's General Stores等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是早期交易中波幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Upstart Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here’s what they learned
items.title_zh: 新兴华尔街研究公司表示，它已派遣一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。以下是他们学到的知识
items.desc_en: Citrini Research said it dispatched an analyst to Oman's Musandam Peninsula, where he traveled by boat to observe shipping activity firsthand.
items.desc_zh: Citrini Research表示，它派遣一名分析师前往阿曼的穆桑丹半岛，在那里他乘船前往观察航运活动。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, Strategy & more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票： Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics、Strategy等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙（ Jamie Dimon ）在年度信函中列举了地缘政治、人工智能和私人市场的风险
items.desc_en: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙（ Jamie Dimon ）在给股东的年度信中指出，摩根大通成立250周年，并呼吁对美国的理想做出广泛的承诺。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国3月就业人数增加17.8万人，高于预期；失业率为4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份非农就业人数将增加59,000人，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: The March jobs report will be released on Friday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 3月份的就业报告将于周五发布。接下来会发生什么
items.desc_en: The U.S. economy is projected to show job gains of 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份美国经济将增加59,000个就业岗位，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
items.title_zh: ADP表示， 3月私营部门招聘总人数为62,000人，好于预期
items.desc_en: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.
items.desc_zh: 私营部门就业增长保持同步，但医疗保健和建筑业继续提供几乎所有的动力。

items.title_en: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
items.title_zh: 为什么每加仑汽油价格4 $不会引发美联储加息—并可能导致降息
items.desc_en: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.
items.desc_zh: 虽然利率走向仍存在很大的不确定性，但华尔街的评论又回到了降息的预期。

items.title_en: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
items.title_zh: 中国供应商警告说，由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭，美国人的价格会上涨
items.desc_en: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争阻碍了通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油及其产品的运输，引发了中国制造商对供应链中断的担忧。

items.title_en: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
items.title_zh: 新的费用，更少的航班：更高的燃油价格使消费者的预算超出了加油站的范围
items.desc_en: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.
items.desc_zh: 随着企业政策的变化，美国人将在加油站以外的钱包中感受到更高的油价。

items.title_en: Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount
items.title_zh: 随着通胀担忧加剧，市场现在将美联储的下一步行动视为潜在的加息
items.desc_en: Traders in the futures market shifted the probability of a rate increase by the end of 2026 to 52% on Friday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周五上午，期货市场的交易员将2026年底加息的可能性提高到52%。

items.title_en: China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook
items.title_zh: 中国工业利润年初飙升15% ，但油价冲击威胁前景
items.desc_en: Soaring energy prices are expected to impact China's economy less than most other countries, due to its massive oil reserves and alternative energy sources.
items.desc_zh: 由于其庞大的石油储量和替代能源，预计能源价格飙升对中国经济的影响将小于其他大多数国家。

items.title_en: Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate
items.title_zh: 全球预测组织认为，今年美国通胀率为4.2% ，远高于美联储的估计
items.desc_en: The forecast is a sharp step up from the prior projection of 2.8%. Moreover, it is much higher than the 2.7% Fed officials estimated.
items.desc_zh: 该预测比之前预测的2.8%大幅上升。此外，它远高于美联储官员估计的2.7%。
